recommendations.title: Legacy of Lies
recommendations.overview: An ex-MI6 agent is thrown back into the world of espionage and high stakes to uncover the shocking truth about operations conducted by unknown secret services.

recommendations.title: Ad Vitam
recommendations.overview: When he and his pregnant wife are attacked in their home, a former elite agent becomes trapped in a deadly manhunt tied to his own painful past.

recommendations.title: Cat Person
recommendations.overview: When Margot, a college sophomore, goes on a date with the older Robert, she finds that IRL Robert doesn’t live up to the Robert she has been flirting with over texts.

recommendations.title: Atomic Blonde
recommendations.overview: An undercover MI6 agent is sent to Berlin during the Cold War to investigate the murder of a fellow agent and recover a missing list of double agents.

recommendations.title: Restraint
recommendations.overview: Two fugitives land in hot water when they take a hostage who poses a threat to their well-being.

recommendations.title: Brave Citizen
recommendations.overview: An expelled boxing champion, who now is a high-school teacher, witnesses intolerable violence and throws her first punch to build justice against it, while putting on a mask.

recommendations.title: Notorious
recommendations.overview: In order to help bring Nazis to justice, U.S. government agent T.R. Devlin recruits Alicia Huberman, the American daughter of a convicted German war criminal, as a spy. As they begin to fall for one another, Alicia is instructed to win the affections

recommendations.title: Eyes Without a Face
recommendations.overview: Dr. Génessier is riddled with guilt after an accident that he caused disfigures the face of his daughter, the once beautiful Christiane, who outsiders believe is dead. Dr. Génessier, along with accomplice and laboratory assistant Louise, kidnaps youn

recommendations.title: M
recommendations.overview: In this classic German thriller, Hans Beckert, a serial killer who preys on children, becomes the focus of a massive Berlin police manhunt. Beckert's heinous crimes are so repellant and disruptive to city life that he is even targeted by others in th

recommendations.title: Donnie Brasco
recommendations.overview: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and identifies more with the mafia life at the expense of his regular one.
